title: Railway Switch Controller
description: You can see and control the railway switches ahead!
body:
# Railway Switch Controller
You can see and control the railway switches ahead!

## Loader
[![Fabric](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available%20for-Fabric-dbd0b4)](https://fabricmc.net)

## Environment
![Server and Client](https://img.shields.io/badge/Side-Server%20and%20Client-3c8527)

## Compatibility
- ### Fabric
  - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) (Required)

## Progress
Check out the latest development progress here. [Development Progress](https://www.windysky.top/docs/minecraft-java-edition/railway-switch-controller/version)

## Gallery
![Big](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/771a6dcc88c78f9c1ef82865ead5674ac7dec02c.png)

## Features
- When your minecart approaches a railway switch, a prompt will appear on the screen. You can press a key on your keyboard (the default is **G**, which you can change in your Minecraft settings) to control the direction of the switch.

![Distance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88e0dc30613d40cdd108a91b8e4d1574adaa4723.png)
